title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 150.055 - Assessor to inspect merchants' establishments and report
text:
150.055.  Assessor to inspect merchants' establishments and report. — The county assessor at least once each year prior to the first Monday in May shall visit and inspect each place of business, warehouse, store or other establishment owned and operated by any merchant within his county, for the purpose of obtaining such information as may be desirable or necessary to provide an accurate basis for comparison with the statement made by such merchant under section 150.050.  A report of the information so obtained with respect to each merchant, in such form as may be prescribed by the county commission, shall be made by the assessor to the county board of equalization.
(L. 1951 p. 869)
